items.desc: Szűrőtöltet SEDCO Filtrační kuličky FLOWCLEAR PES AQUA CRYSTAL 1000 g:The Flowclear PES aqua crystal beads last for several season for their function just 50-100 g. The balls are made of polyester microfiber. These bead…
items.raw_desc: Szűrőtöltet SEDCO Filtrační kuličky FLOWCLEAR PES AQUA CRYSTAL 1000 g:The Flowclear PES aqua crystal beads last for several season for their function just 50-100 g. The balls are made of polyester microfiber. These beads with a diameter of about 50-60 mm have a very high filtration capacity. The fibrous structure of the bead has the ability to trap dirt as small as 1.5 micrometers, while the previously used sand only traps dirt around 30-40 micrometers in size. In addition, the balls have the property that they can be used almost indefinitely. After the end of the season, just remove the balls from the filter, then wash them in the washing machine and they are ready to serve another season. A pack of 1 kg filter beads successfully replaces up to 35 kg of sand. Another advantage is that you can use the same filter cartridge as a replacement for relatively expensive and inefficient paper filter cartridges for use in pools with cartridge filtration, whirlpools, garden ponds, etc.                     Technical parameters of the SEDCO filter cartridge of Flowclear PES aqua...

	Nástěnná mýdlenka 3M Command™ nabízí montáž bez vrtání. Díky samolepicí technologii ji připevníte na stěnu. Ez pedig azt jelenti, hogy a szoláris panel hatékonyan kihasználja az akkumulátor kapacitását. A készülék egysoros kijelzővel rendelkezik, mely 12 számjegyű. Mérete 15,45 × 10,1 × 1,8 cm.
